properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.text: Confirm every incoming attestation's (source, target) checkpoint pair is validated for epoch ordering and block-tree ancestry before being tallied toward justification/finalization, rejecting pairs that could let conflicting checkpoints both finalize.
properties.assertion: is_ancestor(source.root,target.root) and source.epoch<target.epoch required before tally_for_finalization(pair)

properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.text: Confirm every finalization/fork-choice comparison of checkpoint heights validates the incoming height field is well-formed and in-range before branching on the non-equal-height case, so a malformed message cannot force conflicting finalized checkpoints.
properties.assertion: require validate_height(cp.height) before height_cmp(source.height, target.height) in non_equal_height branch; reject null/out-of-range/malformed height

properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.text: Verify surround-vote slashing checks validate source/target epoch ordering and bounds on both attestations before comparison, so malformed epochs can't bypass surround detection.

properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.text: Confirm the implementation validates that a checkpoint epoch matches compute_epoch_at_slot(block.slot) and that its root is a genuine chain ancestor before accepting it into justification or finalization updates, rejecting any mismatch.
properties.assertion: forall c in accepted_checkpoints: c.epoch == epoch_of_slot(block[c.root].slot) and is_ancestor(c.root, head)

properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.text: Verify checkpoint justification rejects any supermajority computation whose signer set, height, or checkpoint hash fails validation before votes are tallied.

properties.label: beacon-chain:slashing
properties.text: Verify all height/epoch/index arithmetic in checkpoint and slashing-detection paths uses checked/saturating ops or explicit bounds checks, preventing overflow-induced false negatives in equivocation detection.
properties.assertion: no unchecked +,-,* on height/epoch/index vars in checkpoint/slashing paths; all use checked_add/sub/mul or bounds-checked equivalents

properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.text: Verify pre-quorum validation rejects malformed/duplicate/out-of-range attester weights before they contribute to attesting balance, so total_active_balance and quorum math cannot be inflated to force a false slashing witness.
properties.assertion: validate(attester_weight) before sum; reject if weight<=0 || weight>effective_balance_max || duplicate(attester_id)
